name: media-organizer
description: Python tool that automatically organizes music, books and comics into structured libraries using hardlinks. Features metadata enrichment, genre validation, Navidrome sync and conflict resolution.

name: media-converter
description: Universal media converter for HEIC/HEVC. Hardware-accelerated video transcoding (NVENC/QSV), automatic quality, metadata preservation, and smart batch processing.

name: control-panel
description: Server management system for home servers. Controls external HD drives and Docker containers through a simple CLI interface.
